metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2373
metadata.comment:
Rationale: DGKI was localized in cell bodies, dendrites, dendritic spines, and axon terminals.

26/01/2018 Pim
Authors state:
- "In the cerebellar Purkinje and molecular layers, DGKι signals were detected in cell bodies, dendritic spines, and axon terminals (Figure 3E-G). "
- "Quantitative analysis indicated that DGKι signals are present in 13.3±2.5% of axon terminals and 44.2±4.0% of dendritic spines in the hippocampal CA1 region (n=3 animals for wild type (WT) and knockout (KO); total area analysed, 232.2 μm2/animal). ". Experimental description: Materials and methods
Animals
Sprague-Dawley rats (280-300 g) were used for rat neuron culture, in vivo coimmunoprecipitation, immunoblot analysis, and electron microscopy.
